summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KotlerX Admin Registration Control and University Reports features. All backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login (admin@kotlerx.com / admin123)
Backend: Get programs list
Backend: Toggle registration close with next batch date
Backend: Toggle registration open
Backend: Registration toggle unauthorized rejection (401)
Backend: Registration toggle invalid program (404)
Backend: Download weekly report (Excel)
Backend: Download monthly report (Excel)
Backend: Download batch report (Excel)
Backend: Generate completion report (marks batch completed)
Backend: Reports unauthorized rejection (401)
Backend: Create lead for closed program (waitlist)
Backend: Verify lead in admin panel
Backend: Programs show registration status fields
Frontend: Admin Panel loads with University Reports tab
Frontend: Programs tab shows Open/Closed registration buttons
Frontend: Registration toggle dialog with next batch date input
Frontend: University Reports tab with Weekly/Monthly/Batch reports
Frontend: Batch reports table with Report and Complete buttons
Frontend: Public Programs page shows 'Next Batch' date for closed programs
Frontend: Lead capture dialog shows 'Join Waitlist for Next Batch' title
Frontend: Lead form pre-fills program name and shows starting date
seed_data_creation: Test leads created with TEST_ prefix for waitlist testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Registration Control and University Reports features are fully functional. Test Racing Program has registration closed with next batch date 2026-03-01. Batch batch_f7123030e3e8 is marked as completed. Weekly, Monthly, and Batch reports download as Excel files.

admin_registration_control.toggle_open_close: Working - Admin can toggle registration open/closed per program
admin_registration_control.next_batch_date: Working - Admin can set next batch date when closing registration
admin_registration_control.programs_tab_ui: Working - Shows Open (green) / Closed (red) buttons with lock icons
admin_registration_control.toggle_dialog: Working - Shows confirmation dialog with next batch date input

public_programs_page.closed_registration_display: Working - Shows 'Next Batch: DATE' button instead of 'Register Interest'
public_programs_page.waitlist_text: Working - Shows 'Registration closed - Reserve your spot for the next batch'
public_programs_page.lead_capture_dialog: Working - Shows 'Join Waitlist for Next Batch' with starting date

university_reports.reports_tab: Working - New 'University Reports' tab in Admin Panel
university_reports.weekly_report: Working - Downloads Excel file with current week assessment data
university_reports.monthly_report: Working - Downloads Excel file with current month summary
university_reports.batch_report: Working - Downloads Excel file for specific batch
university_reports.completion_report: Working - Generates final report and marks batch as completed
university_reports.report_contents: Working - Includes Student ID, Name, Email, Mobile, NFC Card ID, Attendance, Assessment Ratings, Certificate Status, Emergency Contact, Medical Info
